title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Care Ratings

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Care Ratings
jsonLd.description:
Care Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Care Ratings:
Care Ratings is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Ratings!
